name: Claritev Corp
business: Claritev is a technology, data and insights company focused on improving transparency, affordability and quality across the healthcare system. It offers solutions across four categories: Claims Intelligence, Network, Payment and Revenue Integrity, and Data and Analytics. The company's direct clients are typically payers, including administrative services only platforms and third-party administrators, while end beneficiaries include employers, plan sponsors, and health plan members.

exposures.sentence: Claritev is a technology, data and insights company focused on improving transparency, affordability and quality across the healthcare system.

Although the end beneficiaries of our solutions are employers and other plan sponsors and their health plan members, our direct clients are typically payers, including administrative services only platforms ("ASO") and third-party administrators ("TPA"), who go to market with our solutions to those end clients.

Security breaches, loss of data and other cyber incidents or disruptions could compromise sensitive business or patient information and negatively impact our business and reputation, harm both us and our clients and create liability.

catalysts.event: Five-year share repurchase program approved by Board of Directors, authorizing up to $75.0 million, starting January 1, 2026.
catalysts.sentence: On December 18, 2025, the Company s Board of Directors approved a five-year share repurchase program (the "Five-Year Program") authorizing the Company to purchase up to $75.0 million of its Class A common stock from time to time in open market transactions, subject to compliance with applicable legal requirements.

catalysts.event: Interest rate swap agreements mature, converting floating rate debt to fixed rate for $800 million notional.
catalysts.sentence: The interest rate swap agreements are effective August 31, 2023 and mature on August 31, 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Total addressable market for out-of-network cost management and out-of-network payment integrity solutions is approximately $10.0 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate the total addressable market ("TAM") for our out-of-network cost management and out-of-network payment integrity solutions is approximately $10.0 billion.

tamClaims.claim: Total addressable market for in-network payment and revenue integrity solutions is approximately $3.0 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate the TAM for our in-network payment and revenue integrity solutions is approximately $3.0 billion.

tamClaims.claim: Opportunities in payer risk analytics, network transparency, and analytic services represent an estimated TAM of $17.0 billion.
tamClaims.sentence: Among others, we see opportunities to provide payer risk analytics, network transparency and analytic services, representing an estimated TAM of $17.0 billion.
